title: Successful Login Redirects User to Last Intended Page (Deep Link Redirect)
description: Verifies that when an unauthenticated user attempts to access a protected page and is redirected to login, after successful authentication they are forwarded to the originally requested URL rather than the default dashboard.
expected_result: After logging in successfully, the user is redirected to /settings/profile (the originally intended page) rather than the default /dashboard, confirming that the post-login destination correctly reflects the last intended page.

test_steps.action: Navigate directly to a protected settings page while unauthenticated
test_steps.expected: User is redirected to the login page because they are not authenticated

test_steps.action: Verify the login form is displayed after redirect
test_steps.expected: Login form is visible on the page

test_steps.action: Enter valid email into the email field
Enter valid password into the password field
Click the Sign In button to authenticate
Wait for redirect to the originally intended protected page
test_steps.expected: User is redirected to /settings/profile (the originally intended page), not /dashboard

test_steps.action: Verify the profile settings page content is rendered
test_steps.expected: Profile settings content is visible, confirming the intended destination was restored
